style_prompt: Despite her low energy, her tone is consistently high.

content: And this was not the result of logical reasoning but was a direct and mysterious reflection.
style_prompt: Speaking quietly, her pitch remains high.

content: If the purpose of marriage is the family, the person who wishes to have many wives or husbands may perhaps obtain much pleasure, but in that case will not have a family.
style_prompt: Maintaining a high pitch, her soft voice matches a regular pace.

content: From the very first days of their married life Natasha had announced her demands.
style_prompt: A female's high-pitched voice is matched with a normal speaking pace.

content: Pierre was greatly surprised by his wife's view, to him a perfectly novel one, that every moment of his life belonged to her and to the family.
style_prompt: The woman's tone is treble, speaking regularly.

content: To adorn herself for others might perhaps have been agreeable-she did not know-but she had no time at all for it.
style_prompt: With low energy, she speaks swiftly and softly.

content: She acted in contradiction to all those rules.
style_prompt: Talking with low energy, her tone remains high.

content: But only what was really good in him was reflected in his wife, all that was not quite good was rejected.
style_prompt: The high-pitched whisper gently reached her ears.

content: The subject which wholly engrossed Natasha's attention was her family: that is, her husband whom she had to keep so that he should belong entirely to her and to the home, and the children whom she had to bear, bring into the world, nurse, and bring up.
style_prompt: Whispering gently, her pitch remains high.

content: Thus in a time of trouble ever memorable to him after the birth of their first child who was delicate, when they had to change the wet nurse three times and Natasha fell ill from despair, Pierre one day told her of Rousseau's view, with which he quite agreed, that to have a wet nurse is unnatural and harmful.
style_prompt: Speaking in a treble, she participates in dynamic conversations.

content: At home Natasha placed herself in the position of a slave to her husband, and the whole household went on tiptoe when he was occupied-that is, was reading or writing in his study.
style_prompt: With a quiet demeanor, her pitch was remarkably high.
